profiles.name: Aisha Khan
profiles.bio: CS major, morning person who loves studying at coffee shops. Early sleeper looking for a quiet roommate.

profiles.name: Marcus Li
profiles.bio: Art & design student. Night owl, into gaming, movies, and cooking. Super chill and easy-going.

profiles.name: Emma Rossi
profiles.bio: Biology major, pre-med track. Quiet studious vibe, into hiking and yoga on weekends.

profiles.name: Jordan Park
profiles.bio: Engineering student, loves cooking international food. Looking for roommates who enjoy community dinners.

profiles.name: Sam Chen
profiles.bio: Business major, gym enthusiast, and coffee addict. Likes a clean shared space and responsible roommates.

rooms.title: Sunny Private Room in Downtown
rooms.description: Bright private bedroom with large windows and hardwood floors. Close to bus lines and downtown amenities. Utilities included. Furnished or unfurnished available.

rooms.title: Shared Room in Student District
rooms.description: Affordable shared room in a safe, student-friendly neighborhood. 10-minute walk to campus. Building has laundry, parking, and study lounge. Utilities split equally.

rooms.title: Modern 1BR in Tech Hub
rooms.description: New construction apartment with modern kitchen and in-unit laundry. Walking distance to restaurants and shops. No smoking. Lease starting June or August.
